recipes.name: Code Review
recipes.description: Run a multi-dimensional code review (security, bugs, architecture, tests, readability, performance) over the current branch's diff or a specified file set.

recipes.name: Daily Briefing
recipes.description: Morning summary of your Jira tickets and Bitbucket PRs.

recipes.name: Environment Config Audit
recipes.description: Audit and tighten the project's environment-variable setup — .env hygiene, .env.example completeness, validation on startup, and CI/CD secret handling.

recipes.name: Git Commit
recipes.description: Group staged changes into logical commits and draft Conventional Commits messages, ready to apply.

recipes.name: Git Conflict Helper
recipes.description: Walk through every active merge conflict, explain both sides, and propose a resolution per file — without applying it until the user confirms.

recipes.name: Git PR Description
recipes.description: Draft a pull request title and description from the current branch's commits and diff against a target branch.

recipes.name: Git Rebase Plan
recipes.description: Plan an interactive rebase — propose the pick/squash/reword/drop sequence and the exact commands, with a backup branch first.

recipes.name: PR Review Prep
recipes.description: Generate a structured review brief for a Bitbucket pull request, with the linked ticket context and past reviewer feedback already pulled in.

recipes.name: Release Notes
recipes.description: Generate release notes for a tag-to-tag (or tag-to-HEAD) range — classified into Features, Fixes, Breaking changes, and the rest, ready to paste into GitHub/GitLab.

recipes.name: Test Environment Prep
recipes.description: Scaffold a test environment for a feature — mock data fixtures, environment-config docs, and empty test files matching the framework already in use.

recipes.name: Ticket to Feature
recipes.description: Turn a Jira ticket into a feature spec, API sketch, and open-questions list using related context from past tickets and PRs.
